turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of pretty good AI. How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, can you tell me your office hours and where you're located?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Our clinic is open Monday through Friday hours are 9:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. on Monday, Tuesday and Thursday, 12:00 p.m. to 7:00 p.m. on, Wednesday and 9 a.m. to 12:00 p.m. on Friday.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Thanks! Do you have a second location?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Is that address correct? I didn't catch it all.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: I just want to confirm the address of your location. Can you repeat it?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Our address is 1234. Recovery. Way. Suite, 200 Austin.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Got it, thanks! Just to clarify, is that in Austin, Texas?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, that's in Austin, Texas. Let me know if you need anything else.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: No, that's all for now. Thanks for your help!

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome. Have a great day.
